disambiguation_rules.president: Ronald Reagan referenced as historical figure communicating assurances to Taiwan in 1982; current policy context uses 'President' generically for U.S. policy framework

parsing_rules: This section contains procedural rules for joint resolution processing in Congress. Key pattern: conditional procedures based on timing of receipt (before/after passage) and identity matching between chambers. The section emphasizes waiver of points of order and expedited consideration timelines.

oddities.note: Section 5 is a definitions section containing primarily statutory cross-references and term definitions rather than substantive policy entities. No new organizational entities beyond committees already extracted appear in this definitional text.
